creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
As I already explained to the pr's author in a personal mail, mplayer's
build process heavily depends on the CFLAGS, and building a player with
runtime cpudetection works if one either lets choose the cflags by the
configure script or sets it to something that is known to work.
Setting WITH_OCFLAGS=yes (e.g. by make config) will prevent precisely
this build error the author mentions. It is therefore activated in the
default setup of the mplayer port. Please close this pr.

Riggs
